what_was_done: Fixed memory search timeout: added 90s per-server timeout for memory in toolshed.json (was 30s default), added dummy embed in warmup thread to prime JIT caches. Diagnosed root cause: cold embedding model + 30s toolshed timeout = search_knowledge failures. megablocks requires GPU (unavailable), so warmup+timeout is the fix.
known_issues: Memory server cold-start takes ~363s (327s model load + 36s indexes) — mitigated by warmup thread + 90s timeout
nomic-embed-text-v2-moe without megablocks is CPU-intensive (megablocks needs GPU, not available)
Gate 17: injection_attempts type mismatch can crash gate (HIGH)
Gate 1: path traversal ../../../../etc/passwd bypasses extension guard (HIGH)
Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)
next_steps: Fix 3 HIGH security issues (gate_02 rm -r, gate_17 type mismatch, gate_01 path traversal)
Fix MEDIUM security issues (unicode bypass, injection scan gap, LIVE_STATE guard)
last_response_preview: Both changes applied and verified: 90s memory timeout in toolshed.json, dummy embed in warmup thread.
